home.title: Reports
home.description: Revenue, shifts, goods receipts, supplier payables, stock, in–out–balance, and expiry alerts. Pick a report to filter by period, export, or print.

view.loadFailedHint: Could not reach the reports server. Try again later or contact support.
view.emptyData: No data for the selected period
view.emptyDataConnectSales: No POS sales linked to a Connect clinic Rx in this period. Open POS from «Pending Rx» and complete checkout — acknowledging the signal alone does not create report rows.
view.noResult: No results yet — click Run report

SALES-01.name: Revenue by period
SALES-01.description: Gross sales, returns, and net revenue by day/week/month (Vietnam time).

SALES-02.name: Revenue by payment method
SALES-02.description: Net revenue by cash, card, bank transfer, and wallet.

SALES-03.name: Shift report
SALES-03.description: Shift list, cash float, and net revenue per shift.

SALES-04.name: Revenue by category
SALES-04.description: Net revenue by product category for the selected period.

SALES-05.name: Sales by clinic / doctor
SALES-05.description: Connect clinic Rx sales rolled up by clinic and prescribing doctor — orders, sales, refunds, net.

PROC-01.name: Goods receipt value
PROC-01.description: Completed receipts summary — amounts before VAT.

PROC-03.name: Supplier payables
PROC-03.description: Outstanding balance and aging at the time you view the report.

INV-01.name: Stock and value
INV-01.description: On-hand quantity and value (quantity × batch cost) by product/warehouse.

INV-02.name: Near expiry
INV-02.description: Batches expiring within the alert window.

INV-03.name: In — out — balance
INV-03.description: Opening balance, period movements, and closing balance by product/warehouse.
